steps: File formal tax reclaim with ATO referencing AU-NO treaty Article 10 for 15% WHT rate on BHP dividend to Norwegian resident
Submit Norwegian tax residency certificate and beneficial ownership declaration to Citigroup Australia
Request Citigroup Australia process refund of excess AUD 138,750 withheld (25% applied vs 15% treaty rate)
Follow up with ATO using treaty relief procedures for foreign resident dividend withholding adjustment

references.title: ATO – Withholding from Dividends Paid to Foreign Residents
AU Treasury – Income Tax Treaties Table
